case_title: ROMAN ALPERT VS. KIMBERLY HUGHES et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PHILIP H. KNUDSEN IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALPERT, ROMAN

ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-20-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALPERT, ROMAN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-10-2010 CONTINUED TO NOV-12-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-27-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-12-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALPERT, ROMAN AS TO DEFENDANT HUGHES, KIMBERLY GILLORY, PATRICIA DOES 1-100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-10-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-07-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-26-2010
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-27-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
